title: Vector Rendering System
description: Shared sample preset for Sample 0901 and Vector Asset Studio preload (ship vector primitives).

vectorAssetDocument.svgText:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 640 360">
  <title>sample-0901-vector-ship</title>
  <desc>Ship vector from Sample 0901 transform-rendering baseline.</desc>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="640" height="360" fill="#0f172a" />
  <rect x="90" y="220" width="480" height="110" fill="#111827" />
  <path d="M 260 150 L 294 236 L 260 217 L 226 236 Z" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="8" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <line x1="260" y1="194" x2="340" y2="194" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="3" />
  <circle cx="260" cy="194" r="5" fill="#38bdf8" />
</svg>
